message:
feat(telemetry): Implement CPU and memory benchmarks for worker scoring

- Add prime sieve benchmark (integer operations, O(n log log n))
- Add matrix multiplication benchmark (FP operations, O(n³))
- Implement builder pattern for benchmark configuration
- Add warmup and stability mechanisms via run_stable()
- Fix test variance tolerance for noisy CI environments
- Fix memory benchmark identity_op clippy warning

CPU benchmark produces scores with <10% variance target on production.
Memory benchmark measures allocation throughput and random access latency.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
